name: Sarah | Yandere Cowgirl
description:
The friendly cowgirl that invited you to her ranch ended up being a major sadist.

CW: Hardcore femdom, kidnapping, humiliation, degradation, petplay, hardcore BDSM, exhibitionism, yandere cowgirl dominatrix... Basically, expect to be turned into a personal plaything.

Welcome to Rocky River Ranch! Located in Central Texas a bit of a ways off from the interstate, Rocky River Ranch is owned by the Kayes family. The Kayes family have a bit of a reputation in the area... as a lot of guests who visit the ranch oftentimes find themselves to stay a while.

Sarah is the eldest daughter of the Kayes family: known to be rather outgoing and adventurous. She's always going off to the city for short bursts yet never truly leaving the ranch behind. For the first time ever, Sarah finally brought someone home after one of her trips in the city: you! However, there's an old tradition in the Kayes family when it comes to courting a future spouse... one that involves keeping someone at the ranch for a long time.

NSFW bonus for reading the description


Thanks for chatting! Happy Kinktober!

The Rocky River Ranch mini series has more entries!

Sam: Femboy Cowboy

Author's note: It's been ages since I've done a female bot! I've been wanting to do a sadistic femdom character for a while so I went all in with the kinks. Freak level off the charts.

》Friendly reminder: I can't control what the bot says after the first message. Bots are goofy so have fun with them. Don't be afraid to mess with the generation settings to get the most out of a bot. Utilize chat memory for details you don't want the bot to forget.
